svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Reminder Scheduling (on-device local notifications)" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-539" dy="-170" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="rt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;" value="packages/shared — computeFireTimes(settings, now, opts)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="460" x="40" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Input + guard: reminder_settings + now + tz
(if disabled / no permission -> cancel all, return [])" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="380" x="40" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Resolve now into user IANA tz (Luxon, DST-correct)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="40" y="134" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Per-day local slots:
INTERVAL = fixed grid from window_start | TIMES = times[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="380" x="40" y="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Expand across horizon days, materialize each to UTC
(DST: skip spring-forward gap / pick earlier on fall-back)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="380" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Filter: active window (interval only, wrap-aware)
+ quiet hours (both modes, wins, wrap-aware)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="380" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Drop past (> now + buffer); sort, dedupe, truncate to N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="40" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Deterministic id per occurrence -> diff vs OS-scheduled set
(cancel stale, schedule missing -> idempotent re-arm)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="380" x="40" y="458" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="occ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="occurrences[ { id, fireAtUtc, title, body } ]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="320" x="70" y="532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c3" edge="1" parent="1" source="c3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c4" edge="1" parent="1" source="c4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c5" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c5" edge="1" parent="1" source="c5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c6" edge="1" parent="1" source="c6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c7" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce_c7" edge="1" parent="1" source="c7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="occ" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;" value="Per-platform: arm LOCAL OS notifications" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="420" x="560" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="MOBILE — expo-notifications
N one-shot DATE triggers; re-arm on AppState
+ background task. Limit: iOS 64 pending cap (use <=60)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="430" x="560" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="DESKTOP — Tauri
in-process tokio timer fires sendNotification;
tray + autostart keep it alive. Limit: only while running" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="430" x="560" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="WEB — Notifications API
in-tab setTimeout, recompute on focus.
Limit: CANNOT fire when tab/app is CLOSED (v1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="430" x="560" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="op1" edge="1" parent="1" source="occ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="pm" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="520" y="150" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="op2" edge="1" parent="1" source="occ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="pd" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="520" y="275" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="op3" edge="1" parent="1" source="occ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="pw" value="schedule"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="520" y="405" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rearm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="RE-ARM TRIGGERS -> recompute
settings edit · cross-device sync · tz change ·
app foreground · local midnight · permission change ·
login / logout · window drain · DST boundary" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="430" x="560" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re" edge="1" parent="1" source="rearm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="c1" value="re-arm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="470" y="528" /> <mxPoint x="470" y="30" /> <mxPoint x="230" y="30" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
